nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: PONCIRUS TRIFOLIATA FRUIT/SOPHORA FLAVESCENS ROOT/DUCHESNEA CHRYSANTHA/SAURURUS CHINENSIS LEAF/ROOT/HOUTTYUNIA CORDATA/PERILLA FRUTESCENS LEAF/LONICERA JAPONICA FLOWER EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: Poncirus Trifoliata Fruit/Sophora Flavescens Root/Duchesnea Chrysantha/Saururus Chinensis Leaf/Root/Houttyunia Cordata/Perilla Frutescens Leaf/Lonicera Japonica (Honeysuckle) Flower Extract is the extract of the fruit of Poncirus trifoliata, the roots of Sophora flavescens and Saururus chinensis , the leaves of Saururus chinensis and Perilla frutescens , the flowers of Lonicera japonica, and the whole plants Duchesnea chrysantha and Houttyunia cordata.
